title: Road Head Construction
description: The moving front of road progress. Clearing trees and brush in front, then laying materials behind. Road heads advance progressively, requiring sustained material supply and labor. Progress is visible as roads extend across the map.
definition-of-done: Road construction progresses from a moving front. Clearing and laying phases work correctly. Visual progress of road extension. Material and labor requirements enforced.
testing-plan: Verify road head advances correctly. Test clearing and laying phases. Verify visual progress. Test material/labor consumption.
